problem id: 7403ef93
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  10000101 -> 00011111
  10110011 -> 10111001
  10011011 -> 00111101
  11111011 -> 00110001
  11011001 -> 01010101
  01010111 -> 01100101
  10001011 -> 00111111
  11111001 -> 01010001
  01011100 -> 10110100
  11100101 -> 00010011

query: 00010010
predicted answer: 10011101
